summary: Comprehensive testing of FlipSlab Engine Inventory Module - All backend and frontend tests pass. 17/17 backend API tests pass covering CRUD operations, search, and filters. Frontend UI fully functional with modal forms, conditional field display, search, filters, edit/delete buttons.

issues: Console warnings about span children in select/option elements - React hydration warning (cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality)

passed_tests: POST /api/inventory - create card with all fields (card_name, player, year, set_name, card_number, variation, condition, grading_company, grade, purchase_price, quantity, notes) - PASS
POST /api/inventory - create Raw card without grading fields - PASS
POST /api/inventory - create minimal card (only card_name required) - PASS
GET /api/inventory - returns items array and total count - PASS
GET /api/inventory?search=kobe - search by keyword returns matching results - PASS
GET /api/inventory?condition=Graded - filter by Graded condition - PASS
GET /api/inventory?condition=Raw - filter by Raw condition - PASS
GET /api/inventory?listed=false - filter by not listed - PASS
GET /api/inventory?listed=true - filter by listed - PASS
GET /api/inventory/stats - returns stats (total_cards, graded, raw, listed, not_listed, total_invested, avg_price) - PASS
GET /api/inventory/{id} - get single item by ID - PASS
GET /api/inventory/{nonexistent} - returns 404 - PASS
PUT /api/inventory/{id} - update card fields - PASS
PUT /api/inventory/{id} - update condition from Raw to Graded with grade - PASS
DELETE /api/inventory/{id} - delete card successfully - PASS
DELETE /api/inventory/{nonexistent} - returns 404 - PASS
Frontend: Stats cards display (Total Cards: 2, Invested: $1850, Graded: 1, Listed: 0/2) - PASS
Frontend: Add Card button opens modal form - PASS
Frontend: Modal has all required fields (card_name, player, year, set, card_number, variation, condition, price, quantity, notes, image upload) - PASS
Frontend: When condition is Raw, grading_company and grade fields are HIDDEN - PASS
Frontend: When condition is Graded, grading_company and grade fields appear - PASS
Frontend: Search input filters cards in real-time - PASS
Frontend: Filter toggle shows condition and listed filter chips - PASS
Frontend: Edit button opens pre-filled modal form - PASS
Frontend: Delete button available on hover - PASS
Frontend: Cards display card_name, player, year, set, variation badge, grade badge (PSA 9), price - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: All API endpoints properly implemented with correct HTTP status codes
Frontend correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from environment
Modal form properly handles conditional field display based on condition type
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements for testing
Search and filter integration working with backend APIs
seed_data_creation: Test items with 'TEST_' prefix created and cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory module fully tested. Current inventory: 2 cards - '1986 Fleer Michael Jordan #57' (Raw, $350) and '1996 Topps Chrome Kobe Bryant #138' (Graded PSA 9, $1500, Refractor variant). Stats: Total Cards 2, Invested $1850, Graded 1, Listed 0/2. All CRUD operations working. Dashboard module was tested in iteration_5 with 100% pass rate.

frontend_features.form_conditional_fields: PASS - grading fields hidden for Raw, shown for Graded
frontend_features.card_display: PASS - shows all info including grade badge
